problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus may resolve How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
